title: pimpinella brachycarpa var. koreana
intro: Pimpinella brachycarpa var. koreana, also known as Korean burnwort or Korean burncress, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Korea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pimpinella brachycarpa var. koreana include its ability to treat burns, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to help reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and soothe skin conditions.
